headline: Nintendo's newest WarioWare is a weirdo smartphone app
summary: Nintendo has launched a new WarioWare title as a smartphone app. This signals a cautious return to mobile gaming for the company. Nintendo had previously scaled back its smartphone ventures after mixed results.

headline: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot is rolling out a redesigned version with a cleaner interface. The company claims the update loads twice as fast. Copilot will now provide more reliable and structured responses.

headline: Amazon's last-gen Paperwhite is on sale for less than the entry-level Kindle
summary: The 2021 Kindle Paperwhite is currently on sale, costing less than the basic Kindle. This last-gen model is waterproof, unlike the latest entry-level version. The deal is available at Woot through June 14th.

headline: Motorola's last-gen Razr Ultra is almost half off
summary: Motorola's 2025 Razr Ultra is available unlocked for $699.99, nearly half its original price. The deal makes the 512GB flip foldable phone more affordable. This offers a premium foldable experience without the flagship cost.

headline: The Best Shrek Merch to Get In 2026
summary: This article highlights the most fascinating Shrek merchandise available in 2026. The selection anticipates Shrek 5 and celebrates the franchise's enduring popularity. It features a variety of Shrek-themed items found online.

headline: The 34" MSI Optix WQHD 144Hz Gaming Monitor Offers Excellent Value for Just $174 Shipped
summary: A 34-inch MSI Optix WQHD 144Hz Gaming Monitor is on sale for an impressive $174, including shipping. The monitor comes brand new with a 1-year MSI warranty. This offers excellent value for a high-refresh-rate gaming display.

headline: The 2026 MacBook Air With New Apple M5 Chip Drops to the Lowest Price Ever for Memorial Day
summary: The 2026 MacBook Air with the new Apple M5 chip has reached its lowest price ever. Amazon is selling it for $200 less than the Apple Store. This Memorial Day deal makes the M5 MacBook Air significantly more affordable.

headline: Save $2,400 Off the Alienware 16X Aurora RTX 5070 Gaming Laptop Loaded With 64GB of RAM and 4TB SSD
summary: The Alienware 16X Aurora RTX 5070 Gaming Laptop is discounted by $2,400. It boasts 64GB of RAM and a massive 4TB SSD for top-tier performance. This Dell Memorial Day sale offers premium build quality at a reduced price.

headline: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
summary: US and Iranian officials are reportedly 'very close' to a deal, according to Vance. The framework for a ceasefire extension deal has been agreed. Final approval is pending from Trump and Iran's leadership.

headline: SAS troops accused of war crimes not referred to police over morale fears, inquiry hears
summary: An inquiry heard that SAS troops accused of war crimes were not reported to police. This decision was reportedly made due to concerns over troop morale. Military police did not learn of extra-judicial killing allegations for years.

headline: Epstein survivors lack faith in UK police investigating Andrew, says lawyer
summary: A lawyer representing Epstein survivors stated clients lack confidence in UK police. They doubt the treatment they would receive from authorities. Concerns relate to the ongoing investigation into Prince Andrew.

headline: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on a launch pad in Florida. The incident occurred during a test on Thursday night. The explosion took place at Cape Canaveral.
